executives.name: David Paterson
executives.background: David Paterson is a qualified chartered accountant and graduate of the University of Queensland. He has been involved in the corporate sector for over 40 years, with experience in corporate advisory, financial management, and the mining industry. He has held various directorships in listed and unlisted companies.

executives.name: John Quayle
executives.background: John Quayle has over 40 years of experience in the mining and construction industries. He has held senior executive positions in several major Australian companies and has extensive experience in project management and corporate governance.

executives.name: John Low
executives.background: John Low is a qualified accountant with over 35 years of experience in financial management and corporate advisory. He has worked with various companies in the mining and resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: John Quayle
board_of_directors.background: John Quayle has over 40 years of experience in the mining and construction industries. He has held senior executive positions in several major Australian companies and has extensive experience in project management and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: David Paterson
board_of_directors.background: David Paterson is a qualified chartered accountant and graduate of the University of Queensland. He has been involved in the corporate sector for over 40 years, with experience in corporate advisory, financial management, and the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Torpey
board_of_directors.background: Kevin Torpey is a graduate of the University of Sydney and has over 50 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior executive positions in several major Australian mining companies and has extensive experience in project development and management.

board_of_directors.name: Philip Sansom
board_of_directors.background: Philip Sansom has over 40 years of experience in the mining and resources sector. He has held senior executive positions in several major Australian companies and has extensive experience in corporate governance and project management.
